title: Get in touch | Calvin Bailey MP
meta_description: Got an issue to raise with Calvin and the team? Fill out this form and let us know.
headings: h2: Calvin is Chair of the All Party Parliamentary Group for the Armed Forces Community.
text_excerpt: --> Get in touch | Calvin Bailey MP top of page Home Latest News About Calvin Upcoming Events Get in touch More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Home Latest News About Calvin Upcoming Events Get in touch More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. GET IN TOUCH Have a local campaign or a national issue to raise with Calvin & the team? Fill out the form below to get in touch. If the issue you're raising is to do with Asylum, Immigration or Nationality, please click the button below to complete a separate form: RAISE ISSUE First name * Last name * Email * Phone * Address * Postcode * calvin.bailey.mp@parliament.uk ​ 0207 219 7417 Email: ​ Phone: Follow Calvin on Social Media: GET IN TOUCH Calvin is Chair of the All Party Parliamentary Group for the Armed Forces Community.
